violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Ham was observed held at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ham was observed stored above cold hold line. Food shall be stored below cold hold line to ensure food maintains adequate temperature. Food relocated to bottom of prep unit. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. 3-bay sink to be used until dish machine adjusted. PIC called dish company at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine turned off to be sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The floor in the closet and coffee serving area has an small accumulation of old rodent droppings.. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Various foods in the server mini fridge was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC elected disposal of all TCS foods before disposal amount was determined. TCS foods will be stored in the coke server fridge or the reach-in fridge moving forward. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The dish washer was observed at 0 ppm for chlorine sanitizer. The 3-bay sink was set up with sanitizer. PIC stated dish washing company was called at the time of inspection. All dishes to continue to be sanitized in 3-bay. The server fridge was observed unable to maintain an adequate ambient temperature. Fridge taken out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the dish washer is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The outside dumpster was observed with large holes in the bottom. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered/protected. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2024
